question: The line chart shows output by year. Which of the following statements is true based on the chart?

options.A: Output declined continuously over the years shown.
options.B: The highest output value extends beyond the top of the chart, so its exact level cannot be read.
options.C: Output in the first and last years shown is identical.
options.D: Output remained roughly constant across all years.

explanation: Values exceeding the y-axis range are clipped, making the top bars look the same and misleading viewers.
